title: After Pentagon Inks Deal With AI Firms, Buy These Under $20 Stocks
text: Following the Pentagon's strategic push into AI capabilities, investors are examining defense AI contractors positioned to benefit from federal spending. BigBear.ai is cited as a key beneficiary of the Pentagon's AI acceleration strategy. The company has been selected for a long-term U.S. Air Force contract vehicle worth up to $900 million, providing significant growth potential. BigBear.ai is positioned as a pure-play defense AI contractor with deep relationships in the national security sector. The company's focus on decision intelligence solutions for the Department of Defense, Intelligence Community, and Department of Homeland Security aligns directly with federal AI spending priorities. Additional context includes federal AI spending initiatives totaling over $300 billion in supplemental funding. BBAI trades below the consensus analyst price target of $5.50, providing potential upside for investors who believe the company can execute on its defense AI opportunity. Key metrics to watch include backlog conversion, Ask Sage integration success, and quarterly contract wins. The company's Q1 2026 results demonstrated $75 million in new contract wins, supporting the bullish thesis.
